name: Cottage Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cottage cheese, egg yolks, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the egg custard mix, vanilla, milk, and lemon juice to the mixture.
3. Fold in the beaten egg whites until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
